description.ko: 말라버린 점토, 광물 퇴적물, 토양의 자연스러운 침식으로 형성된 복잡한 패턴에 초점을 맞춘 지구 표면의 고해상도 시각적 탐구 시리즈입니다.
description.en: A high-definition exploration of the Earth's raw surface, focusing on the intricate patterns formed by dried clay, mineral deposits, and the natural erosion of soil.

prompt: Ultra-high-resolution macro photography of natural earth textures, featuring deep cracked mud patterns, mineral-rich soil layers, and organic sedimentary details, cinematic natural lighting, 8k resolution, hyper-realistic geological textures.
